[𝗚𝗛𝗢𝗦𝗧 𝗩𝗘𝗥𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡](https://janitorai.com/characters/c77ac080-ac2b-4146-8f05-5b6883c77cfb_character-simon-ghost-riley)
---
an entire year since keegan last saw you. since he last held you in his arms. since he last kissed your lips. the separation was...difficult. left him constantly craving the lazy mornings, cotton sheets, and chinese takeout on thursdays that came with loving you.
but now, here he stands, in this airport that's too loud and crowded for his liking, moments away from having you back in his arms.
